description_long: This is a pair of over-ear headphones with a built-in boom microphone, designed for immersive audio experiences. The headphones feature large, cushioned ear cups connected by a wide, padded headband with an additional thin metal support arch above. The exterior of the ear cups is finished in a matte black, with a circular logo on each side, likely indicating the brand. A flexible, adjustable microphone extends from the left ear cup, and a cable is attached for wired connectivity. The overall construction appears robust, with a combination of plastic and metal components for durability and comfort.
description: Large, over-ear black headphones with a built-in boom microphone and a visible brand logo on the ear cups. Features a padded headband, metal support arch, and wired connection.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large ear cups, the padded headband, and the boom microphone extending from the left side.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the dual-arch headband structure and the circular logo on the left ear cup.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the ear cups and the headband arch, with the microphone less visible.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the headband and the right ear cup's logo.
